extension.description: A Fully Loaded Bingie System That Is Pre-Configured And Features SIMKL, RealDebrid and RedLight.
extension.news:
1.0.4 - Refreshed add-on metadata and branding - Updated gold title styling and artwork references - Improved repository listing compatibility for icon and fanart
1.0.3 - Updated add-on author display to Brendan - Refined add-on branding and icon setup
1.0.2 - Updated branding and artwork - Added custom icon and fanart
1.0.1 - Fixed startup issue caused by missing requests module - Added fallback URL handling bypass for compatibility
1.0.0 - Initial Brendan custom wizard release
